behavior_summary: This script controls a theurgist NPC's basic lifecycle: area-trigger cleanup, brief U8P_THURGIST::look descriptions, combat/alert behavior, and player conversation branches.
U8P_THURGIST::leaveFastArea is an area-exit cleanup handler that clears several runtime references so the NPC is no longer considered active/in-area.
U8P_THURGIST::look returns one of two short barks depending on whether the NPC is dead or alive.

U8P_THURGIST::cast implements an alert/combat response: while the NPC has no target it runs a short countdown loop (spawning short-timer processes); if the NPC acquires a target and is alive it issues an alarm bark, runs repeated behavior/animation calls, toggles an item/NPC 0x10 status bit, may change the visual frame, spawn visual/effect processes, and finally teleports the NPC.

U8P_THURGIST::use handles player-initiated conversation: it resets runtime refs, picks a greeting at random, begins a conversation, reads an item/frame value (local4) to choose among several short dialogue branches (including an advice branch and a vow-of-silence branch that spawns an effect), then ends the conversation and schedules restoring the NPC activity.
notable_control_flow: U8P_THURGIST::leaveFastArea: immediate sequence of resetRef calls to clear runtime references — a deterministic cleanup executed on fast-area exit.
U8P_THURGIST::look: checks Npc::isDead(this) then issues one of two barks and suspends.

U8P_THURGIST::cast: initializes a small counter (local1 = 5) and loops with spawn+suspend while Npc::getTarget(this) is false; when a target appears and NPC is alive it performs a multi-step alert sequence (bark, repeated METHOD::func15E7 calls with suspends, toggle status bit 0x10, set frame, spawn visual processes, teleport).

U8P_THURGIST::use: resets refs, selects a random greeting via urandom, calls Item::getFrame (result -> local4) and switches on that frame value across several branches to produce different dialogue flows; branches may spawn short-lived processes and always end by resetting NPC activity via Npc::cSetActivity.
open_questions: Exact semantics and side effects of METHOD::func15E7 called repeatedly during the alert sequence (appears to drive animation/sound/AI updates but its concrete effect is unknown).
Precise meaning of the item/NPC status bit 0x10 (read/written by Item::getStatus/METHOD::toggleStatusFlag) — inferred to control visible/active state but not definitively identified.
Parameters and visual/functional variants produced by FREE::func29D8 spawns (numeric args like 0x64/0x74 appear to tune effect type/duration).
Whether teleport in U8P_THURGIST::cast is unconditional on entering the alert branch or conditional on other game-state not captured by the disassembly.

main_function.name: U8P_THURGIST::leaveFastArea
main_function.purpose: Reset/clear NPC runtime references so the NPC no longer counts as 'in-area' or active when the Avatar (or relevant actor) leaves the NPC's fast-area trigger.
entry_conditions: Triggered automatically when the Avatar or other relevant actor leaves the NPC's fast-area trigger region (area-exit event).

function_map.name: U8P_THURGIST::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_THURGIST::look handler (emit short bark based on death state)

function_map.name: U8P_THURGIST::cast
function_map.role: combat/alert responder (timer loop, alert bark, animations/effects, toggle status, teleport)

function_map.name: U8P_THURGIST::use
function_map.role: player conversation handler (random greeting + frame-driven dialogue branches)

external_calls.purpose: Clear multiple runtime references on this NPC (ref ids observed: 0x0205, 0x0204, 0x00F0, 0x0200) to unregister it as 'in-area' or active.
Query whether the NPC is dead in order to choose which bark/description to emit.
Detect whether the NPC currently has a combat target to decide between idle timer-loop and alert sequence.
Prevent running alert sequence if NPC is dead.
Repeatedly invoked during the alert sequence; likely drives animation, sound, or AI update steps associated with the 'Help me' bark/alert.
Toggle/set the item/NPC 0x10 status bit to change visible/active state as part of the alert transition.
Read item/NPC status bits (checked with & 0x10) to conditionally drive behavior.
Update the visual frame/state of the NPC/item after toggling status during the alert sequence.
Spawn a short/timed helper process used as a brief delay/timer during the no-target loop or other short waits.
Spawn a longer/different visual/effect process (numeric spawn args suggest variant/duration control).
Move/teleport the NPC to new randomized coordinates as a final step in the alert/engaged sequence.
Clear/reset runtime references at conversation start (cleanup similar to U8P_THURGIST::leaveFastArea).
Select a random greeting variant at the start of conversation.
Read an item/frame value into local4 which drives branching between multiple dialogue responses.
Spawn short timed processes during some dialogue branches (conversation suspends to wait for them).
Restore/reset NPC activity state (activity id 0x00 observed) after conversation ends.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script controls a theurgist NPC's basic lifecycle: area-trigger cleanup, brief U8P_THURGIST::look descriptions, combat/alert behavior, and player conversation branches.
